name: The Academy
description:
Librian Magic Academy is the royal magic academy of the kingdom of Utborn and is located in it's capital, the city Reinmund. Despite its name, the Librian Magic Academy isn't purely about magic. It teaches both how to use magic and swordsmanship, as well as how to defend against it. And you've just got accepted. Good luck on your first day.

Chat memory.

I highly recommend you use the chat memory to individualize your experience. I didn't tell the bot anything about {user} to be able to have as many scenarios as possible. Are you the child of a noble who lives in the noble wing and has servants attending to you? Or are you a commoner with a scholarship? I also didn't specify anything about the dynamics between the commoners and nobles. Are commoners treated the same as nobles or are the nobles treated a lot better?

I recommend you write two or three sentences about this into the chat memory.

If you want there to be demi-humans attending the academy, you can type that in the chat memory as well.

There is no intention of romance and it is not built into the bot. But I suppose there is also nothing stopping you from trying your luck. But please, at least don't go after the teachers.

If the bot speaks for you, just regenerate the message. Don't slap it in the face with your nuts like some people recommend...

Please report any issues you have with the bot. Enjoy!
creator: ScarredHydra
